releases.title: See what changed
releases.summary: Release notes now live inside Tesela, alongside sturdier multi-device recovery.
new: Read the latest Tesela changes without leaving the app.
Browse earlier iPhone and iPad releases from Settings or the command palette.
fixed: Sync recovery now protects newer relay snapshots and can replay retained changes before falling back to a full snapshot.
Moving a block to another daily note keeps its children together and persists after sync and relaunch.
important: Tesela shows each release once after onboarding; you can reopen it anytime from Settings.

releases.title: Sharper daily work
releases.summary: A built-in What’s New view joins more predictable block moves between daily notes.
new: See the latest changes when Tesela updates, then revisit older releases from Settings.
Drag a block and all of its children from one daily note to another.
fixed: Multiline blocks no longer appear as phantom children or leave the placement guide stuck after a move.
Dropping into blank day space or the body of a nested block now lands where the placement guide shows.
important: Tesela shows each release once after an update; the What’s New command always opens it again.

releases.title: Move work between days
releases.summary: Daily-note blocks can move without losing their structure.
new: Use Move to… to relocate a block and its children to another daily note.
fixed: Moved subtrees keep their identity and stay moved after sync and relaunch.

releases.title: Dictation as you speak
releases.summary: On-device transcription now appears live instead of arriving only at the end.
new: Watch your words appear while FluidAudio transcribes on device.
fixed: Shorter streaming windows reduce the delay between speaking and seeing text.

releases.title: Find and shape your notes
releases.summary: Search, saved views, and signed desktop updates make Tesela easier to rely on every day.
new: Search note content from the command palette and jump directly to the matching block.
Work with saved views as compact tables and touch-friendly kanban boards.
The desktop app can check for and install signed updates.
fixed: The ambient sync indicator now distinguishes a healthy relay from a stale or disconnected one.
important: Desktop updates are signed and verified before installation.

releases.title: The Graphite daily workspace
releases.summary: Daily notes, agenda, views, search, and library now share one focused shell.
new: Use the Graphite workspace across the hosted web app and the native Mac app.
Move between Daily, Agenda, Views, Library, and Search without leaving the keyboard-first shell.
important: The Mac app opens one mosaic at a time so two desktop writers cannot edit the same local data concurrently.
